revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:S needing substitution checking]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Weasel-inline}} begin-->{{Fix-span | content = {{{text|<noinclude>Some people say that this may be true.</noinclude>}}} | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:Avoid weasel words | text = weasel words | title = Who says this? | cat = [[Category:All articles with specifically marked weasel-worded phrases]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Weasel inline]][[Category:qq]] | date = {{{date|}}} | cat-date = Category:Articles with specifically marked weasel-worded phrases}}<!--{{Weasel-inline}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
